name: Bismuth Crystal Citadel
description: An endless procedural canyon of iridescent, stair-stepped geometric bismuth crystals with thin-film interference coloring.
author: AI

params.name: Terrace Step Size
params.description: Controls the size of the stepped terraces characteristic of bismuth crystals.

params.name: Ascension Speed
params.description: Speed at which the camera moves through the infinite crystal citadel.

params.name: Metallic Shine
params.description: Intensity of specular highlights on the metallic crystal surfaces.

params.name: Iridescence Shift
params.description: Shifts the rainbow-like thin-film interference colors across the crystal surfaces.
